---
title: "Your Proposal Title Here"
subtitle: "Current and Pending Support"
author:
  - name: "Your Name"
    affiliations:
      - name: "Your Institution"
---

<!-- CURRENT AND PENDING SUPPORT
     List ALL current and pending support for the PI.
     Required fields: project title, source, amount, dates, person-months/year.

     NSF now uses the SciENcv system for C&P — confirm with your
     sponsored programs office whether to submit via SciENcv or
     upload a PDF directly. If using SciENcv, you can delete this file. -->

# Current and Pending Support

| Status | Source | Title | Amount | Dates | Person-Months/Yr |
|:-------|:-------|:------|-------:|:------|------------------:|
| Current | <!-- SOURCE --> | <!-- TITLE --> | $<!-- AMOUNT --> | <!-- START–END --> | <!-- X --> |
| Pending | NSF (solicitation #) | Your Proposal Title | $TODO | TODO–TODO | TODO |

<!-- Add additional rows as needed. If no current support, replace the
     Current row with:
     | None | — | — | — | — | — |
-->
